dialog:croc_update_available:title: croc update available!
dialog:croc_update_available:body1: Version {v} of croc is now available!
dialog:croc_update_available:body2: Would you like to go to the GitHub releases page to download it?
dialog:croc_update_available:body3: Note: If you installed croc via your operating system's package manager, you should update it from there instead.
dialog:swampswap_update_available:title: Swamp Swap update available!
dialog:swampswap_update_available:body1: Version {v} of Swamp Swap is now available!
dialog:swampswap_update_available:body2: Would you like to go to the GitHub releases page to download it?
dialog:croc_not_installed:title: croc not installed
dialog:croc_not_installed:body1: It looks like croc isn't installed!
dialog:croc_not_installed:body2: Please click Open to go to its GitHub page, or choose Close to close the program.
dialog:accept:title: Accept transfer
dialog:no_receive_path:title: No output path
dialog:no_receive_path:body: The output folder is blank. Please enter a path.
dialog:invalid_receive_path:title: Invalid output folder
dialog:invalid_receive_path:body1: The output folder doesn't exist or is invalid.
dialog:invalid_receive_path:body2: However, Swamp Swap will create this path when receiving any files or folders assuming the path is a possible path and not random text. You just can't open the folder if it doesn't exist. Create it or allow Swamp Swap to do so when you receive files.
dialog:saved_settings:title: Saved settings
dialog:default_settings:title: Reset settings
dialog:default_settings:body: Are you sure you want to reset settings to default? This can't be undone!
dialog:settings_are_default:title: Settings are default
dialog:settings_are_default:body: All of the settings are already at their default values. No action has been performed.
dialog:unsaved_settings:title: Unsaved settings
dialog:unsaved_settings:body:
You have unsaved changes. WIthout saving, your custom settings will not be applied to your croc transfers.

It is advised that you save your settings before continuing.
dialog:clear_list_confirm:title: Confirm clearing
dialog:clear_list_confirm:body: Are you sure you want to clear the list of files you want to send?
dialog:cancel_path_change_confirm:title: Discard changes?
dialog:cancel_path_change_confirm:body: By clicking cancel after modifying the list, you are discarding your changes. Are you sure you wish to proceed?
dialog:quick_send_warning:title: Clear current selected files list?
dialog:quick_send_warning:body: Doing a quick send will clear your currently selected files list before queueing up what you'd like to quick send. Are you sure you wish to proceed?
menubar:window_receive_code:title: Enter receive code
menubar:window_bad_code:title: Invalid code
menubar:window_bad_code:body: The provided code was blank or invalid.
send:label:please_select: Select or drag-drop files or folders.
manage_send_list:window:title: Manage files and folders to be sent
options:language:label: Language
options:theme:label: Theme
options:startup_console:label: Show console on startup
options:startup_console:tooltip: If checked, the console window will always start open when the program starts.
options:startup_croc_updates_check:label: Check for croc updates on startup
options:startup_croc_updates_check:toolt: If checked, Swamp Swap will notify you if an update is available for croc.
options:startup_swampswap_updates_check:: Check for GUI updates on startup
If checked, Swamp Swap will notify you if an update is available for the GUI application.
options:yes:label: Auto-agree to all prompts
options:yes:tooltip: If checked, you will automatically accept all files being received and approve all files being sent.
options:nocompress:label: Disable compression
options:nocompress:tooltip: Disables compressing the files that will be sent.
options:relay:label: IPv4 address:
options:relay:tooltip: The IPv4 address of the relay. Don't change this unless you're configuring your own relay.
options:relay6:label: IPv6 address:
options:relay6:tooltip: The IPv6 address of the relay. Don't change this unless you're configuring your own relay.
options:password:label: Password:
options:password:tooltip: The password for the relay. Don't change this unless you're configuring your own relay.
options:curve:label: Encryption curve:
options:curve:tooltip: The encryption curve used when sending and receiving files.
options:ip:label: Sender IP:
options:ip:tooltip: Restrict received transfers to originate from a specified IP. Useful to confirm the sender's identity if their IP is known.
options:multicast:label: Multicast IP:
options:multicast:tooltip: Multicast IP address used for local discovery.
options:socks5:label: SOCKS5 proxy:
options:connect:label: HTTP proxy:
options:throttleupload:label: Upload throttle:
options:throttleupload:tooltip: Throttle the upload speed by a specified amount.
options:internaldns:label: Use built-in DNS solver
options:internaldns:tooltip: If checked, a built-in DNS resolver will be used instead of the normal DNS resolver used by the user's machine.
options:classic:label: Classic mode (unsecure)
options:classic:tooltip: Uses croc's classic mode. This is less secure due to potential local attack vectors, so only use this if you know what you're doing.
options:local:label: Local connections only
options:local:tooltip: Only allows connections and file transfers over LAN.
console:window:title: Console
about:window:title: About
about:disclaimer: Swamp Swap is not affiliated with Zack Schollz or croc.
